query:
-- Insert 17 attendance records for Tyler Brooks (enrollment ID from previous query)
-- Insert 16 attendance records for Mia Rodriguez  
-- Insert 15 attendance records for Jake Peterson
-- These will show up in "Runner Up for Next Belt" card

-- First, let's get the exact IDs
SELECT id, customerName FROM enrollments WHERE customerName IN ('Tyler Brooks', 'Mia Rodriguez', 'Jake Peterson');
